mentions.note: Real company with differentiated inference technology (4T transistor chip, 15x faster than GPU in some cases); strong OpenAI ($20B) and AWS partnerships. But IPO mania valuation: 187x sales at $311 vs. Nvidia 26x, AMD 21x, Broadcom 33x. Raised from $8B private valuation 8 months ago; currently $95B. Cramer: great company, terrible entry—wait for giant pullback.
